helmet.title: Rebate Calculator: Estimate Your Trading Cashback | FXPayout

header.title: Calculate Your Trading Rebate Estimate Now
header.paragraph: Enter your broker, account type, and total trading lots to discover the rebate estimates you can earn every month fast, transparent, and at no cost.

card.title: Rebate Estimate Calculator

card.info: <0>fxpayout</0> returns up to 90% of IB commissions to traders. The rebate process is automated, secure, and transparent, without changing your spreads, leverage, or trading conditions.
